pr.title: Record: 11L XSA4 + Multi-Pass Streaming Score-First Legal TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.0523)

output.summary: Multi-pass streaming score-first legal TTT uses shifted data orderings and per-token min-NLL with a RoPE cache clone fix for backprop.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT adapts solely on validation tokens, scoring each under inference_mode before any training pass.
techniques: Multi-pass streaming score-first TTT with shifted trajectories
Rotary cache clone fix enabling RoPE backprop
